posts.title: Neocities API post feed
posts.markdown: New post feed, I'm writing these posts in obsidian! I made an obsidian plugin that uploads my posts to a json file, marked.js then converts the markdown to HTML and splits up each post. pretty cool! I can even update this from my phone!
